title: Hugo's School Garden Through the Seasons
synopsis: Hugo explores his school garden as it changes through the four seasons, learning about nature's cycles and how plants grow and change throughout the year.

pages.text: Hugo loves his school garden! In spring, everything is waking up. The flowers are blooming pink and yellow. Hugo plants tiny seeds in the soft, brown soil.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes kneeling in a school garden planting seeds. The scene shows spring with blooming flowers in soft pink and yellow pastels, green grass sprouting, and a gentle blue sky with fluffy white clouds.
illustration.alt: Hugo planting seeds in the spring school garden

pages.text: The rain falls gently on Hugo's garden. He watches the green shoots peek up from the ground. His teacher says the plants are growing big and strong, just like Hugo!

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes standing in the school garden during a gentle spring rain, watching small green shoots emerging from the soil. The scene features spring pastels with soft greens and light rain drops falling from a pale gray sky.
illustration.alt: Hugo watching plants grow in the spring rain

pages.text: Summer is here! Hugo's garden is full of bright colors. The sunflowers are tall, and the tomatoes are red and juicy. Hugo picks berries to share with his friends.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes picking bright red berries in a vibrant summer school garden. The scene shows summer brights with tall yellow sunflowers, red tomatoes, and a brilliant blue sky with warm sunshine.
illustration.alt: Hugo picking berries in the summer garden

pages.text: Hugo waters the thirsty plants with his watering can. The bees buzz happily around the flowers. Everything in the garden is growing under the warm summer sun.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes watering plants with a blue watering can in the school garden. The scene shows bright summer colors with bees buzzing around colorful flowers under a warm, golden sun.
illustration.alt: Hugo watering plants in the sunny summer garden

pages.text: Autumn brings orange and red leaves. Hugo helps harvest pumpkins and apples from the school garden. The air is cool, and the leaves crunch under his feet.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes carrying a small orange pumpkin in the school garden during autumn. The scene shows autumn warmth with golden, orange, and red leaves falling from trees and scattered on the ground.
illustration.alt: Hugo harvesting pumpkins in the autumn garden

pages.text: Winter covers Hugo's garden with soft white snow. The plants are sleeping now. Hugo knows that in spring, his garden will wake up again and start the cycle all over.

illustration.description: A boy with straight light blonde hair, fair skin, light blue eyes standing in the snow-covered school garden during winter. The scene shows winter cool colors with white snow covering sleeping plants, bare tree branches, and a pale winter sky.
illustration.alt: Hugo in the winter school garden covered with snow

metadata.illustrationStyle: seasonal cycle, spring pastels, summer brights, autumn warmth, winter cool, same scene different seasons, time passing, nature calendar, cyclical beauty

questions.question: What does Hugo plant in the spring garden?
questions.explanation: Hugo plants seeds in the spring, which grow into plants throughout the seasons.

questions.question: What color are the tomatoes in Hugo's summer garden?
questions.explanation: The tomatoes in Hugo's garden are red and juicy in the summer.

questions.question: What does Hugo harvest in autumn?
questions.explanation: Hugo harvests pumpkins and apples from his school garden in autumn.

questions.question: What covers the garden in winter?
questions.explanation: In winter, soft white snow covers Hugo's school garden while the plants sleep.
